name: week-plan-meeting-section
goal: Restore a Key Meetings section to the week-plan skill by exposing inferMeetingImportance() in calendar pull JSON and updating the skill to capture and display prep-worthy meetings.

userStories.title: Extract pullCalendar Helper with Test Suite (TDD)
userStories.description: Extract the pullCalendar function into a testable helper with dependency injection, and write tests simultaneously using a mock calendar provider.
acceptanceCriteria: PullCalendarDeps type exported with getCalendarProviderFn and loadConfigFn
pullCalendarHelper() function exported with optional deps parameter
Test: --json returns { success: true, events: [...] } structure
Test: event objects contain required fields (title, startTime, endTime, calendar, attendees)
Test: --today flag filters to today's events only
Test: calendar not configured returns JSON error with helpful message
All tests use mock provider via dependency injection
Existing CLI behavior unchanged

userStories.title: Add Importance, Organizer, and Notes to JSON Output
userStories.description: Call inferMeetingImportance() for each calendar event and add importance, organizer, and notes fields to the JSON output. Include hasAgenda check.
acceptanceCriteria: JSON output includes importance: 'light' | 'normal' | 'important' per event
JSON output includes organizer: { name, email, self } | null
JSON output includes notes: string | null
WorkspacePaths resolved to find now/agendas/ directory
hasAgenda passed to inferMeetingImportance() when agenda file exists
Use services.storage.list() for agenda lookup (not direct fs)
Code comment documents JSON output structure for skill reference
Test: 1:1 meeting (2 attendees) outputs importance: 'important'
Test: large meeting (5+ attendees) outputs importance: 'light'
Test: event without organizer computes importance via attendee count
Test: event with matching agenda upgrades light to normal

userStories.title: Update Week-Plan Skill to Capture Key Meetings
userStories.description: Modify the week-plan skill's Step 2.5 to use the importance field from calendar JSON, group meetings by priority level, and capture the confirmed list for output.
acceptanceCriteria: Step 2.5 updated to parse importance field from calendar JSON
Meetings grouped: High priority (important) vs Prep-worthy (normal)
Each meeting shows why flagged: (1:1), (you organized), (has agenda), (external)
User can add/remove/skip meetings with quick confirmation
Explicit instruction: Keep this confirmed list for Step 4 output
Step 4 updated to write Key Meetings section using confirmed list
Empty state: No high-priority meetings this week — light calendar!
light importance meetings hidden unless user asks
Fallback to title matching if importance field missing

userStories.title: Add Key Meetings Section to Week Template and Documentation
userStories.description: Add the Key Meetings section to the week template, update LEARNINGS.md with section semantics, and update the capability catalog.
acceptanceCriteria: Template includes Key Meetings section between Weekly Priorities and Today
Section format: checkboxes with day/time/title/attendees/prep status
Template comments explain format and that section is optional
LEARNINGS.md section table updated with Key Meetings row
LEARNINGS.md pre-edit checklist updated
dev/catalog/capabilities.json updated with new calendar JSON fields
Manual QA: arete pull calendar --json shows new fields
Manual QA: week-plan end-to-end shows Key Meetings in output
